title: KLA's (KLAC) Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates in Q1
text: KLA's (KLAC) fiscal Q1 results reflect gains from increased customer demand across major product groups. Also, strong performance of the Patterning systems business remains a tailwind.

title: KLA: Semiconductor-Equipment Makers Are Not Dead Money
text: The market is assigning a valuation level to semiconductor equipment maker KLA Corp (TTM P/E=14) that is 30% below that of the S&P 500 (P/E=20). And that is despite the fact that KLA grew revenue and earnings by more than 30% last year (FY22 ended with the June quarter).

title: KLA (KLAC) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: KLA (KLAC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 13.50% and 5.20%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: SK Hynix adds to evidence that the chip glut is here to stay for a while
text: SK Hynix Inc. added to concerns Wednesday that the semiconductor industry has entered a glut as the chip maker missed expectations for the quarter and forecast declining market demand out into 2023.

title: KLA Corporation Reports Fiscal 2023 First Quarter Results
text: Total revenues were $2.72 billion, GAAP diluted EPS attributable to KLA was $7.20 and non-GAAP diluted EPS attributable to KLA was $7.06, each finishing above the respective guidance ranges; Cash flow from operating activities for the quarter and 12 months ended Sept. 30, 2022 were $1.01 billion and $3.46 billion, respectively; and Capital returns for the quarter and 12 months ended Sept.

title: 7 Stocks Set for a Stellar Earnings Smasher
text: It's a big week for stock investors, with several top U.S. companies reporting their third-quarter earnings. Most experts expect earnings to be poor, with the trends seen earlier in the year projected to continue into the third and fourth quarters.

title: KLA (KLAC) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: KLA's (KLAC) fiscal Q1 results are likely to reflect gains from strong customer demand in each of its major product groups. Yet, supply-chain constraints might have persisted.

title: KLA Launches New Double-Sided Direct Imaging Platform Supporting Continued Innovation for PCBs and IC Substrates
text: The Orbotech Corus™ DI platform provides a fully automated and extendable solution for highly accurate and efficient patterning processes MILPITAS, Calif. , Oct. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) introduced the new Orbotech Corus™ 8M direct imaging (DI) solution, the first system built on the all-in-one revolutionary Orbotech Corus platform, combining the functionality and automation of an entire direct imaging production line in a closed, clean and compact unit.

title: Why KLA (KLAC) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: KLA (KLAC) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: An Investor's Look at Semiconductors
text: "They are in everything from the remote control on your TV to the fastest supercomputers in the world, to healthcare devices, to our military's weapons systems."

title: U.S. Sweeping Rules to Take a Toll on AMAT, KLAC, LRCX & ASML
text: Export regulations imposed by the U.S. Department of Commerce on China chip-makers are likely to brings further disruptions in the semiconductor industry.

title: Taiwan Semiconductor Shares Rise on Hopes of Lower Fallout from U.S. Curbs
text: U.S. curbs may not be too bad but Taiwan Semi, along with other chipmakers will soon be struggling with softer demand.

title: KLA Announces First Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Earnings Date
text: MILPITAS, Calif. , Oct. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced that the company will review first quarter fiscal year 2023 earnings on Wednesday, October 26, 2022 at 2 p.m.

title: Chip stocks slammed by new ban on chip and AI technology for China
text: The chip sector melted down Friday after U.S. regulators moved to pump the brakes on China's military ambitions by issuing new restrictions on semiconductor and AI technology that can be sold to the country.

title: KLAC: A Compelling Buy In The Semiconductor Segment
text: KLA is the leader in a vital sub-segment of the semiconductor manufacturing space. It owns a proven strategy of meshing technical excellence and creating network effects through service relationships with its customers.
